src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support to allow the use of @Scheduled annotations.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6+ requirements for Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { ... @Bean public SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Switch from Firebase-specific pre-authentication filter to a generic JWT request filter for authentication.
Explicitly configure CORS settings via a dedicated CorsFilter bean to replace implicit or legacy handling.
Introduce a PasswordEncoder bean using the delegating factory, likely required for new security features or compliance.
Enable method-level security annotations using the modern @EnableMethodSecurity annotation.
Refactor HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and disable legacy features like HTTP Basic and CSRF explicitly.
Migrate authorization rules from the old authorizeRequests() API to the new authorizeHttpRequests() API with explicit permitAll/authenticated matchers.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.general_idea: Migrate the UserRepository from Spring Data JPA to jOOQ for database access.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.human_impl: Changed class from interface extending JpaRepository to class using DSLContext and Zkmf2024UserDao.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Remove Firebase Authentication dependency and replace with custom JWT-based authentication logic.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed FirebaseAuth imports and logic; added JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and custom login endpoint returning LoginResponseDTO.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Implement a new login endpoint that validates credentials against the database and issues JWT tokens.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added POST /public/auth endpoint accepting LoginRequestDTO, checking password with PasswordEncoder, and returning JWT via JwtService.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Enable admin impersonation of users by checking against a master password configuration.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added check for applicationProperties.getEncodedMasterPassword() in login logic to set impersonation flag in JWT.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub helper registration with actual service call and proper error handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Replaced TODO stub with helperRegistrationService.register() and switch expression for INVALID_EMAIL, ALREADY_REGISTERED, REGISTERED.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub newsletter registration with actual service call and proper error handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Replaced TODO stub with newsletterService.register() and switch expression for INVALID_EMAIL, ALREADY_REGISTERED, REGISTERED.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Update validation annotations from javax to jakarta namespace for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added import jakarta.validation.Valid and applied @Valid to request body parameters.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok @Slf4j annotation.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed static Logger field and LoggerFactory call; added @Slf4j annotation and used log.info/warn.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Rename DTO classes to follow standard naming conventions (ending in DTO).
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Changed imports and usage from RegisterHelperRequestDto to RegisterHelperRequestDTO, etc.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Inject new services required for the refactored authentication and registration logic.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added NewsletterService, HelperRegistrationService, JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and ApplicationProperties to constructor.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/se.general_idea: Remove unused imports for the domain User class and JPA EntityNotFoundException.
Update import to use the new DTO-based UserRole class instead of the nested domain enum.
Update the authorization logic to map the POJO role string to the new UserRole enum and use the modern exception throwing syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Rename the Maven artifact ID to match the new project naming convention.
Bump the project version to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Upgrade MapStruct dependency to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add JJWT dependencies for JWT handling, replacing or supplementing previous auth mechanisms.
Add Apache POI dependencies for Excel file processing.
Add Apache POI OOXML dependencies for modern Excel format support.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the Angular frontend during the Maven build process.
Add typescript-generator-maven-plugin to generate TypeScript definitions from Java DTOs.
Add SonarQube Maven plugin for code quality analysis.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add explicit Maven Surefire plugin version for test execution.
Add database connection properties for local development.
Add SonarCloud configuration properties.
Add Spring Boot Web starter dependency.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter dependency.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter dependency, replacing manual javax.mail dependencies.
Add Spring Boot Thymeleaf starter dependency for templating.
Add Spring Boot WebFlux starter dependency for reactive web support.
Add Spring Boot jOOQ starter dependency, replacing JPA/Data-JDBC.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 utility library.
Switch database driver from MySQL to PostgreSQL.
Update Testcontainers dependencies to use PostgreSQL module instead of MySQL.
Remove Firebase Admin SDK dependency.
Remove explicit javax.mail dependency in favor of Spring Boot starter.
Remove explicit javax.activation dependency in favor of Spring Boot starter.
Remove Spring Data JPA starter as the project switches to jOOQ.
Remove Spring Data REST starter.
Remove Spring Data JDBC starter as the project switches to jOOQ.
Add a Maven profile for production builds that triggers the frontend build.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper JAR to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.6 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and modern plugin features.

.run/ServerApplication.run.xml.general_idea: Configure the IDE run configuration to explicitly use Java 21 as the execution runtime.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 0.5.6 to 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'version 3.2.0' and updated download URLs to point to org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/3.2.0.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax for better readability and nesting support.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced instances of `command` with $(command) throughout the script.

mvnw.general_idea: Ensure the wrapper script works correctly on Windows with Git Bash auto-CRLF by stripping carriage returns from configuration values.
mvnw.human_impl: Added tr -s '\r\n' ' ' in concat_lines and logic to remove '\r' from read values.

mvnw.general_idea: Add explicit error handling for directory changes to prevent silent failures in path resolution.
mvnw.human_impl: Added '|| exit 1' to cd commands in find_maven_basedir and mingw path resolution.

mvnw.general_idea: Modernize Java home detection logic to use standard command resolution instead of legacy M2_HOME resolution.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed M2_HOME resolution block and updated JAVACMD detection to use command -v.

mvnw.general_idea: Introduce a centralized logging function to support verbose output when MVNW_VERBOSE is set.
mvnw.human_impl: Added log() function and replaced direct echo statements with log calls.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from https to http to match the standard license header format.
